3256440.name: Tunnel Baby Demo
3256440.description:
Experience Tunnel Baby's Fist Act

Play through the first act of Tunnel Baby in this gameplay demo.

Confront the Unknown

Step into the shoes of civil engineer Steve Wilkins as he embarks on a routine repair job turned survival challenge. In this demo, you'll experience:

  • Claustrophobic Passageways: Navigate the Plum River utility tunnels where danger and mystery lurks.

  • Combat: Defend yourself against otherworldly creatures using just a lead pipe and a flashlight.

  • Puzzles: Test your wits as you solve environmental puzzles essential for progression.

  • Unravel Mysteries: Begin to uncover the start of story behind the secret of the Baby in the tunnel.

The demo focuses exclusively on the gameplay elements and narrative from the first act, setting the stage for what unfolds in the full game.
